stem: The width of a rectangular patio is w meters. The length of the patio is 9 meters longer than its width. Which of the following expresses the perimeter, in meters, of the patio in terms of w?
rationale: The length is w + 9. The perimeter of a rectangle is 2(length + width) = 2(w + 9 + w) = 2(2w + 9) = 4w + 18. Choice A is correct.
